page_metadata.biotools__summary: CyPathia is a cytoscape app, that provides a user friendly and straightforward interface. The CyPathia app is based on Hipathia Bioconductor package, allowing the Cytoscape community the possibility of using mechanistic models.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CyPathia is a cytoscape app, that provides a user friendly and straightforward interface. The CyPathia app is based on Hipathia Bioconductor package, allowing the Cytoscape community the possibility of using mechanistic models.
